Hello, World

This is a placeholder general post. Replace with your actual content.

What This Blog Is

This blog covers four categories:

  • CTF Writeups вҖ” solutions and analysis of capture-the-flag challenges
  • Project Writeups вҖ” deep dives into personal projects
  • Research Writeups вҖ” notes and findings from ongoing research
  • General вҖ” everything else

Most posts will be technical. Some will be short notes. A few might be longer essays.

Why Blog?

Writing forces clarity. If I canвҖҷt explain it in writing, I donвҖҷt understand it well enough.

The target audience is people like me вҖ” technical, curious, willing to read long posts with code in them.
